name: Whitefish Baked w/ Fiddlehead Ferns
recipeIngredient: Salt and white pepper to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. PREHEAT OVEN TO 375°F.
2. Combine wine and mustard in a 3-inch deep baking dish large enough to hold the whitefish fillets in 1 layer.
3. Place the whitefish in the wine mixture and sprinkle with salt, pepper, and thyme.
4. Place onions and fiddleheads on top of the fish.
5. Cover the dish and place it in the oven for 20 minutes.
6. Remove the baking dish from the oven.
7. Arrange a bed of onions and fiddleheads on a platter.
8. Place the fish on top of the vegetables.
9. Swirl butter into the cooking liquid and pour over the fish.
10. Serve immediately.
